prompt: 我需要给现有的 REST API 加实时推送能力，数据变更时客户端能立即收到更新
assertions: The response diagnoses this as a solution-clarity problem (approach comparison needed) rather than a goal-clarity problem
The response compares at least 2 viable technical options (e.g., WebSocket, SSE, long-polling)
The response leads with a concrete recommendation and explains trade-offs
The response asks the user to confirm the chosen approach before moving to design
